calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Continued To Nov-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:18 am, pausing at 10:20 am, resuming at 10:21 am, pausing at 10:24 am, resuming at 10:32 am, and concluding at 10:48 am.

Plaintiff Domo Inc. is present represented by Alexander Hettena, Esq via zoom video conference.
Defendant Huckleberry Technologies Inc. is not present

BLAKE GREENHALGH is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff Domo Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Service Order
Exhibit 2: Statment
Exhibit 3: Services Agreement

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Domo Inc., and against Defendant Huckleberry Technologies Inc., as follows:

Damages: $91,375.00
Prejudgment Interest: $4,906.70
Attorney Fees: $10,325.37
Costs: $534.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $107,144.07

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.(D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 3:27 p.m. and concluding at 3:31 p.m.

Plaintiff Domo Inc. appearing represented by John Vaknin, Esq via Zoom phone call.
Defendant Huckleberry Technologies, Inc. not appearing

Plaintiff's counsel is unable to join Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff's Witness is unavailable.

Good cause appearing, The Court ORDERS the matter continued to September 13, 2023 at 1:30 p.m. Counsel is ordered to appear either in person with the witness or via Zoom Video Conference.
(D505)
